adjudication_raw:
Review: Account-takeover fraud GNN evaluation.

Verdict: empirical_test_agreed

The GNN comparison contains three issues: operating point asymmetry (GNN tuned to 0.8% budget; rules engine accidentally hits 0.8% due to seasonal volume), stale rule weights (analyst revisions 4 months prior not replayed), and single-month evidence scope for a replacement claim. These are genuine but correctable issues. The GNN's structural approach to fraud graph analysis likely provides real advantages; the magnitude of the advantage needs empirical confirmation with updated rules at a matched threshold.

empirical_test.measure: Fraud capture rate at 0.8% review rate on test month
empirical_test.success_criterion: GNN fraud capture rate leads updated rules engine by ≥ 8 pp at matched review-rate threshold
empirical_test.failure_criterion: Gap below 5 pp between GNN and updated, properly-configured rules engine
